categoryDetails.title: SDLC & Models
categoryDetails.description: Understanding Software Development Life Cycle models like Waterfall, Agile, and V-Model for better test planning.

categoryDetails.title: UI & UX Testing
categoryDetails.description: Master the art of visual validation, accessibility standards, and intuitive navigation flows across diverse screen resolutions.

categoryDetails.title: API & Integration
categoryDetails.description: Verifying data integrity between services without a graphical interface.

categoryDetails.title: Mobile Apps
categoryDetails.description: Android and iOS specific testing challenges, including interrupts and low battery conditions.

categoryDetails.title: SQL & Data
categoryDetails.description: Verifying back-end operations, schema changes, and complex data migrations.

categoryDetails.title: Soft Skills
categoryDetails.description: Communication, bug reporting, and stakeholder management for high-impact testers.

categoryDetails.title: Performance & Load
categoryDetails.description: Simulating high-traffic scenarios and identifying bottleneck thresholds before they affect the end-user experience.
